zh.lifeSummary: John De Tynedale, De Comyn於大約0991年出生在津巴布韋馬塔貝萊藍德 素斯音希瑟亞阿爾爾。他至少有1個兒子。他去世於大約1021年在英國蘇格蘭莫雷享年32歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: John De Tynedale, De Comyn于大约0991年出生在辛巴威馬塔貝萊藍德 素斯音希瑟亞阿爾爾。他至少有1个儿子。他去世于大约1021年在英国苏格兰莫雷享年32岁。

nameMeanings.name: De

meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Tynedale,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly Sussex and Nottinghamshire): variant of   Tindall  . This surname is also established in Jamaica.

variants.name: Tindall
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Lincolnshire): habitational name from Tynedale, the valley of the river Tyne, or from a place in Cumbria called Tindale, which is situated on a tributary of the South Tyne. The name derives from a British river name Tina (apparently from a Celtic root meaning ‘to flow’) + Old English dæl or Old Norse dalr ‘valley’.

nameMeanings.name: Comyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Cumming
meanings: Scottish (of Norman origin): most probably a habitational name from Bosc-Benard-Commin in Eure, France. This place lies on the edge of the Forêt de Rouvray, near Rouen, in the heart of the district from which came numerous Domesday barons, and so is much more likely to be the source of the name than Comines in Nord. The name is also possibly derived from the personal name Cumin, which is found in Norfolk, Lincolnshire, and Yorkshire in the 12th and 13th centuries and may be of Breton origin, according to Reaney. Compare Old Breton Cunmin, which also appears as Cumin, and is from con- ‘hound’ with an uncertain second element, perhaps the min ‘edge’ which is found in other personal names.

Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Cuimín (or Ó Cuimín) ‘son (or ‘descendant’) of Cuimín’, a personal name formed from a diminutive of cam ‘crooked’. There was a 7th-century abbot of Iona named Cumin. In Scotland, this Irish surname became confused with the Norman name.

History: A notable bearer of the Norman surname is Wilhelmus Comyn, Bishop of Durham, who came north to Scotland with King David I in 1124 and was appointed Chancellor of Scotland. He established his nephew Richard in Tynedale and Roxburghshire, and Richard also rose to be Chancellor of Scotland. The Comyn or Cumming family gained the earldoms of Buchan and Menteith and rose to be the most powerful noble family in Scotland in the century before the rise of King Robert Bruce.

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

en.lifeSummary: John De Tynedale, De Comyn was born about 0991, in Altyre, Insiza, Matabeleland South, Zimbabwe. He had at least 1 son. He died about 1021, in Moray, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 32.

fr.lifeSummary: John De Tynedale, De Comyn est né environ 0991, à Altyre, Insiza, Matabeleland South, Zimbabwe. Il a eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé environ 1021, à Moray, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 32 ans.

de.lifeSummary: John De Tynedale, De Comyn wurde um 0991 in Altyre, Insiza, Matabeleland South, Simbabwe geboren. Er hatte mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb um 1021 im Alter von 32 Jahren in Moray, Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: John De Tynedale, De Comyn è nato il circa 0991 nel Altyre, Insiza, Matabeleland South, Zimbabwe. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio. Morì circa 1021, nel Moray, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 32 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John De Tynedale, De Comynは約0991年にジンバブエマタベレランド ソウスインシザアルトイアで生まれた。彼は少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は約1021年にイギリススコットランドモーアイで32歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John De Tynedale, De Comyn(은)는 대략 0991년 짐바브웨 마타벨렐랜드 소우스 인시자 알티어에서 태어났다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1021년 영국 스코틀랜드 모라이에서 32세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: John De Tynedale, De Comyn nasceu aproximadamente 0991, em Altyre, Insiza, Matabeleland South, Zimbábue. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1021, em Moray, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 32 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: John De Tynedale, De Comyn родился около 0991 г. в местности алтир, инсиза, матабелеланд соут, Зимбабве. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер около 1021 г. в местности мореи, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 32 лет.
